title: ourisia × prorepens
intro: Ourisia × prorepens, commonly known as the creeping foxglove or creeping foxglove mintbush, is a hybrid plant species within the Ourisia genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ourisia × prorepens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
